allow: Bash(git -c 'user.name=Claude Code' -c user.email=noreply@anthropic.com commit -q -m 'MVP Archiv_blockov: profily, sken/UID, zoznam bločkov, detail dokladu \(PDF+QR\), kategórie, položky, dashboard *)
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\), f\) for f in ['ui/main_window.py','ui/item_search.py','core/pdf_export.py']]; print\('syntax OK'\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ui.main_window, ui.item_search; print\('UI import OK'\)")
PowerShell(venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import ui.main_window, ui.item_search; print\('UI import OK'\)")

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "data\\archiv_blockov.db"\) { $c = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection } else { "no-db" }; venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from pathlib import Path; from core.database import Database; db=Database\(Path\('data/archiv_blockov.db'\)\); db.connect\(\); print\('profiles:', [\(p.id,p.name,p.kind,p.vat_enabled\) for p in db.get_profiles\(\)]\); [print\('  receipts in',p.id,':',len\(db.get_receipts\(p.id\)\)\) for p in db.get_profiles\(\)]; db.disconnect\(\)")

PowerShell(venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from pathlib import Path; from core.database import Database; db=Database\(Path\('data/archiv_blockov.db'\)\); db.connect\(\); [print\(p.name, '->', db.get_popis_history\(p.id\)\) for p in db.get_profiles\(\)]; db.disconnect\(\)")

Bash(QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ui.platform_utils, ui.main_window, ui.item_search, ui.receipt_detail, core.pdf_export; from core.pdf_export import _register_font, _find_font_file; _register_font\(\); print\('OK fonts:', core.pdf_export._FONT_NAME, core.pdf_export._FONT_BOLD\) if False else None; import core.pdf_export as p; print\('import OK; font=', p._FONT_NAME\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -m compileall -q core ui models main.py tests)
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -m compileall -q core/excel_export.py core/pdf_export.py core/database.py ui/main_window.py)
